svg.title: Phase 1: User Data Scraping & Discovery Workflow
svg.desc: Detailed workflow showing how the system authenticates, navigates SaaS portals, extracts user data, and handles pagination

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data is in the session state?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent find the user directory?')

g.text: Extract: Name, Email, Role, License, Last Login

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Where does the extracted data go?')
